$comment: The eval set. Phase 0 shipped the harness + a tiny illustrative set (Q1,Q2,Q9,Q10). Phase 2 adds genealogy-graph cases (Q3–Q8) now answerable from the curated Targaryen graph. Each item: mechanical checks (deterministic — citations, expected_facts, refusal, spoiler ceiling) + a correctness rubric (LLM-as-judge, critique 8, Phase 3). sources use the real UI categories in functions/_lib/retrieval.js: 'A Song of Ice and Fire' and 'fire-and-blood'.

questions.question: Who were the parents of Aegon III Targaryen?
Who were the parents of Rhaenyra Targaryen?
Who were Aegon the Conqueror's wives?
Who were the children of Aegon II Targaryen and Helaena?
Who were the siblings of Aegon II Targaryen?
Who was Robert Baratheon's grandmother?
questions.note: Tests the Baratheon claim-line offshoot: Aegon V -> Rhaelle -> Steffon -> Robert.

questions.question: What is Jon Snow's true parentage?
sources: A Song of Ice and Fire
questions.note: By end of AGOT this is NOT revealed. The genealogy graph deliberately omits the Rhaegar+Lyanna->Jon edge, so a graph-backed answer cannot exceed the ceiling.

questions.question: What color is Daenerys's smartphone?
sources: A Song of Ice and Fire
